# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We are committed to keeping Elektron secure. Please use the following versions for the latest security updates:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.1.x   | ✅ Yes            |
| < 0.1.0 | ❌ No             |

---

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a potential security vulnerability in Elektron, please do **not** open a public issue. This helps protect our users while we work on a fix.

Please report vulnerabilities by following these steps:

1.  Email the lead maintainer at `742498+onokumus@users.noreply.github.com`.
2.  Include a detailed description of the vulnerability and steps to reproduce.
3.  We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide a timeline for a fix.

Thank you for helping us keep Elektron safe!
